lastReleaseMessage: v0.57.5 preship gauntlet expansion + audit-driven polish

barRaise.topFinding: The product focus has not moved, only where the energy goes. The Keepers (M4) detour stopped, but v0.57.2 through v0.57.5 all poured into preship gates, audit checks, and tests, tooling around a game whose M1 loop still does not exist: wave cadence, oil-zero fail, fog of war, save/load, audio, and Hold the Wall are every one open P1. Audio is the hard blocker, zero files and no named source against the v0.4.0 mute-MVP lock. One regression: the five scripts/*.ps1.bak files got committed in v0.57.4 instead of deleted. Close the slice; stop polishing the scaffolding.
